## Submission Type

- [ ] New event record
- [ ] Existing event update
- [ ] Schema or metadata change

## Record Details

- Record id:
- File path:
- Dilemma category (e.g. participate/boycott, negotiate/resist):

## Contributor Checklist

For **new records**:
- [ ] I started from the latest template in `schemas/`
- [ ] I validated with `make validate`
- [ ] The record is written from a Neutral Point of View (NPOV)
- [ ] Every inline citation maps to a real entry in `references`
- [ ] Every `references[].author_ids` entry maps to `cited_authors`, and every cited author includes a short `bio`
- [ ] Every inline citation includes verbatim quotation(s) from the source

For **existing record updates**:
- [ ] I validated with `make validate`
- [ ] The edits maintain a Neutral Point of View (NPOV)
- [ ] Every inline citation maps to a real entry in `references`
- [ ] Every `references[].author_ids` entry maps to `cited_authors`, and every cited author includes a short `bio`
- [ ] Every inline citation includes verbatim quotation(s) from the source

## Sources And Verification Notes

Summarize the core sources and mention anything a reviewer should verify closely.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out any schema edge cases, uncertain claims, or follow-up work.
